blocks.content: He listened to it all the way through.
That didn't feel random… it's humbling knowing I bring that side out of you. I really like that song.
She exhaled. She hadn't realized she'd been holding her breath.
I played it three times before I sent it. The third time I stopped overthinking.
I'm glad you sent it. I would have wanted to know.
It's a lot to put in a song recommendation.
It's the right amount. I like when things that are actually big show up without ceremony.
That's very much a you thing to say.
Yes. You notice the weight of things without needing the announcement. It's one of the first things I noticed about you.
You noticed a lot about me from a stone wall.
You were drawing me. From a stone wall. I had some time to observe.
